title: Unexpected answer when indexing and argument-passing "upto" buses

features.name: upto_bus_function_argument_and_indexing
features.description: Code should include passing a little-endian "upto" packed array (declared with [0:N]) as a function argument and then indexing into it with a loop variable
features.snippet: function automatic [0:3] foo(input [0:4] argA, input [0:3] argB); reg [0:3] res; reg [31:0] i, j; begin res = 4'b0; for (i = 0; i < 4; i = i + 1) for (j = 0; j < 5; j = j + 1) res[i] = res[i] | ((argA[j] && argB[i]) && (i == j)); foo = res; end endfunction

features.name: upto_bus_localparam_assignment
features.description: Code should include assigning a function return value to a localparam where the function receives little-endian "upto" packed array arguments
features.snippet: localparam [0:4] A = 5'b01100; localparam [0:3] B = 4'b1100; localparam [0:3] R = foo(A, B);

features.name: nested_loop_upto_bus_indexing
features.description: Code should include nested for loops where bits from two little-endian "upto" packed arrays are compared and used to assign result bits via indexed access
features.snippet: for (i = 0; i < 4; i = i + 1) for (j = 0; j < 5; j = j + 1) res[i] = res[i] | ((argA[j] && argB[i]) && (i == j));
